interface.shortDescription: MT Newswires brings real-time global financial news directly into Codex — providing original, unbiased an...
interface.longDescription:
MT Newswires brings real-time global financial news directly into Codex — providing original, unbiased and comprehensive multi-asset class coverage of capital markets and economies in over 180 topics.

Powered by a global newsroom trusted by the largest banks, brokerages, professional trading, wealth management and research applications globally, every story is built for AI — so you get answers grounded in live market intelligence, not stale data.

What you can do:
• Get the latest news on any ticker and analyze price impact
• Monitor energy sector developments across global equities 
• Track macro events and global central bank signals in real time
• Screen for earnings, M&A, and market-moving headlines

Example prompts:
→ "What is the latest news for NVIDIA and has it influenced the stock's price?"
→ "Summarize the major analyst rating change developments from the past hour."
→ "What macro events are driving markets today?"
defaultPrompt: Summarize the latest MT Newswires updates on this company
